home.heroTitle: Fast, private internet across the galaxy
home.heroSubtitle: GalaxyVPN gives you a constantly-updated pool of working servers from around the world. Pick a plan, scan, connect.

features.speedDesc: Our system tests every server around the clock and removes the dead ones automatically.
features.globalDesc: Servers across many countries, each labelled with its flag and latency.
features.shareDesc: Use your subscription on multiple devices at the same time.
features.privacyDesc: We don't track your browsing. Pay once, connect freely.

plans.title: Choose your plan
plans.subtitle: Servers are refreshed continuously. Prices in Russian Rubles (₽).

auth.title: Sign in to GalaxyVPN
auth.subtitle: Use your Google account to continue.

checkout.title: Complete your payment
checkout.qrPlaceholder: Demo QR — the real payment QR will appear here
checkout.sberInstruction: Send the exact amount above to our Sber Bank account, then attach the receipt screenshot below.
checkout.noReceipt: Please attach the receipt image first.
checkout.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

profile.title: Your account
profile.noSub: You don't have a subscription yet.
profile.pendingDesc: We received your receipt. Your subscription activates as soon as an admin approves it.
profile.rejectedDesc: Your last payment was not approved.
profile.subLinkHint: Add this link in your VPN app (Hiddify / v2rayN …).

servers.title: Live server pool
servers.name: Name
servers.empty: No servers yet — run a check from the admin Repos page.

repos.title: GitHub repositories
repos.hint: Add repos whose .txt files hold server links. The scheduled worker tests them and updates the live pool.
repos.recheckHint: Re-fetch every repo, retest all servers, drop the ones that no longer work.
repos.syncRequested: ✓ Re-check started — the local worker will refresh the server list shortly.
repos.lteRecheckHint: Run this while your PC is on LTE (or a phone hotspot). Servers that still pass become LTE-tagged; the rest become Wi-Fi only.
repos.lteRequested: ✓ LTE re-check started — make sure you're on mobile data right now.
